name: EMIS Schools Portal catalog and institutional profiles
executiveSummary: The official Schools Portal exposes school identity, district, address, public contacts, principal, education stages, authorization window, language sectors, student and teacher counts, and richer sections containing facilities, programs, budgets, rules and plans.
provider: Education Management Information System (EMIS), Ministry of Education, Science and Youth of Georgia
geography: Georgia; region ID 1009 is Tbilisi. The region summary reported 176 public and 118 private Tbilisi schools; filtered search returned 287 rows.
updateCadence: Unknown; responses do not carry an as-of timestamp. Counts and profiles appear operational but cadence is not documented.
accessSummary: Unauthenticated JSON GET endpoints under https://skolebi.emis.ge/back/. The backend is public but undocumented; cache and use modest request rates.
license: Unclear; public access is not an explicit open-data license.
recordCount: Tbilisi region summary: 294 schools; Tbilisi search: 287 rows; discrepancy unexplained

accessPoints.label: Search schools
accessPoints.notes: Use plural regions=1009; pagination uses page and size.

accessPoints.label: School profile section
accessPoints.notes: Observed detail types: mission, structure, programsandsupport, behaviorrulesandappellation, infrastructure, finance, strategicplan, yearlyactionplan.

schemas.name: School search response
schemas.description: Paginated school cards returned by /school/search.

fields.notes: Differed from regional count sum of 294.

schemas.name: Detailed school profile
schemas.description: Full record returned by /school/search/{schoolId}.

fields.notes: Date order is not explicitly documented.
School 2 detail still contained null fields.
School 2 detail still contained null fields.

schemas.name: Profile section and attachments
schemas.description: Common shape for mission, infrastructure, finance and related school-detail sections.

fields.example: სსიპ ქალა თბილისის N154 საჯარო სკოლის 2024 წლის ბიუჯეტი

fields.notes: Unit undocumented; MB is only an inference.

samples.label: Tbilisi school 154 profile
samples.value: {"id":2,"name":"სსიპ - ქალაქ თბილისის №154 საჯარო სკოლა","regionName":"თბილისი","districtName":"გლდანი-ნაძალადევი","address":"თბილისი, გლდანი-ნაძალადევი, თემქის მე-4 მ/რ","principal":"გიორგი გარსიძე","schoolType":"PUBLIC","authorizationStartDate":"08/09/2023 00:00:00","authorizationEndDate":"08/09/2032 00:00:00","studentCount":742,"teacherCount":52,"sectors":"ქართული","infrastructure":true,"finance":true}

caveats: Undocumented backend can change.
No coordinates in the validated JSON route.
Search total 287 differs from the Tbilisi region count sum 294.
Boolean section flags do not guarantee non-null section content.
reliability: Official portal backend returned JSON without authentication.
Official Ministry description says the e-catalog covers infrastructure, education level, process/programs, teacher/pupil counts and safety.
Independent ArcGIS coordinate endpoint returned 499 Token Required.
privacy: Principal name is public role-holder data; retain only when necessary.
Attachment author is a public portal account identifier, not proof of document authorship.

name: EMIS first-grade limits and free places
executiveSummary: For a school ID, EMIS returns one row per building address, language sector and shift with total first-grade limit, a separate SEN limit, and currently free general and SEN places.
geography: Georgia; query by school ID, including Tbilisi schools from the main EMIS catalog.
updateCadence: No timestamp. Free-place fields are operational in meaning but were not independently observed changing.
accessSummary: Unauthenticated JSON GET for /school/search/{schoolId}/firstgradelimit; a public setting endpoint controls whether the UI shows it.
recordCount: One or more rows per school building, language sector and shift; one row for tested school 2

schemas.name: First-grade capacity row
schemas.description: Building/sector/shift capacity and free-place row.

fields.notes: SEN is inferred to mean special educational needs; API does not expand it.

schemas.name: Visibility setting
schemas.description: Public configuration row controlling table visibility.

caveats: No record timestamp or documented update cadence.
Do not describe freePlaces as live without repeated change testing or provider confirmation.
SEN expansion is an inference.
reliability: Official public UI backend returned data without authentication.
Visibility setting returned SCHOOL_LIMIT_SHOW=true during the test.

name: Tbilisi municipal kindergarten directory and map
executiveSummary: The official kindergarten map backend lists 191 municipal kindergartens by Tbilisi district with name, address, phone and optional coordinates. The complete table includes institutions that cannot be mapped because coordinates are null.
geography: Ten Tbilisi districts; 191 total rows. 147 had coordinates and 44 did not in the test.
updateCadence: Unknown; the public page is maintained as a directory but exposes no update date per record.
accessSummary: GET /api/v1/public/gartensByRaion/{districtId} for IDs 1 through 10. JSON, no auth, CORS wildcard.
recordCount: 191 total; 147 with both coordinates and 44 without

schemas.name: Directory response
schemas.description: Application-status envelope and kindergarten rows.

fields.notes: CRS not documented; public page plots in Google Maps.

caveats: 44 records lacked one or both coordinates.
The page explicitly says not every kindergarten is on the map; the table is the complete list.
No stable record ID is included in this directory response.
reliability: Official page source directly calls the endpoint.
All ten district calls returned status 200 and a total of 191 records.
CORS wildcard was verified.

name: Tbilisi kindergarten registration capacity by age group
executiveSummary: The official registration backend lists districts and 191 gardens, then returns age-band groups with total places, registrations and remaining places. The live registration UI uses REMAINED to disable full groups.
geography: Tbilisi municipal kindergarten system; ten districts and 191 regular gardens.
updateCadence: No source timestamp. Operational UI use strongly suggests dynamic updates during registration, but current testing did not observe a change over time.
accessSummary: Unauthenticated JSON GET endpoints for raions, regular/summer gardens and groups. CORS wildcard. Personal child lookup and registration routes are explicitly out of scope.
recordCount: 10 districts; 191 regular gardens; 54 summer-garden rows; group count varies by garden

accessPoints.label: Groups for garden
accessPoints.notes: UI queries this on selection and disables groups where REMAINED is zero.

schemas.name: District response
schemas.description: District reference rows.

schemas.name: Garden response
schemas.description: Regular and summer-garden reference rows.

fields.meaning: Whether UI may show remaining capacity
fields.notes: Observed in regular gardens; absent in tested summer schema.

schemas.name: Registration group response
schemas.description: Age-band capacity and occupancy rows.

fields.notes: Observed PLACES - QUANTITY; UI disables full groups.

caveats: No response timestamp or documented update cadence.
Operational freshness is inferred from UI behavior, not proven by observed change.
The regular and summer garden schemas differ by SHOW_REMAINED.
reliability: Official registration form JavaScript directly references these routes.
All tested GETs returned JSON and CORS wildcard.
On test date, official page said registration stage three opened 2026-07-20.
privacy: Do not call public/check/{personalId}/{lastName} for research.
Do not call registration POST routes; group data is aggregate and sufficient.

name: NAPR / NSDI social, institutional and cultural points of interest
executiveSummary: Official WFS layers provide geocoded education, medical, service, sport, administration, recreation, cultural, religious, theatre, museum and monument points with names, subtypes, opening hours and public contacts.
provider: National Agency of Public Registry (NAPR), National Spatial Data Infrastructure (NSDI)
geography: Georgia. Tested Tbilisi-centered bbox 44.7,41.65,44.9,41.82; bbox counts are not administrative Tbilisi totals.
updateCadence: NSDI metadata describes field/inventory collection mainly during 2017–2023. WFS response timeStamp is not a dataset-update timestamp.
accessSummary: OGC WFS 2.0.0 GetCapabilities, DescribeFeatureType and GetFeature. GeoJSON output; no auth. WAF required a browser User-Agent and NSDI Referer during command-line tests.
license: Unclear; official public view/download is verified but no explicit reuse license was located.
recordCount: Test bbox: Education 1,350; Medical 1,572; SocialService 6,009; Sport 1,071; PublicAdministration 359; Entertainment 1,282; CulturalActivities 586; Religion 364; Theatre 26; Museum 69; Historical.Monument 22

accessPoints.label: Public-service WFS
accessPoints.notes: Use WFS 2.0.0; browser User-Agent and NSDI Referer were needed through WAF.

schemas.name: WFS GeoJSON response
schemas.description: Common collection and GeoJSON feature envelope.

schemas.name: US facility layers: Education, GeneralMedicalService, SocialService, Sport, Entertainment-Recreation
schemas.description: Exact shared properties for napr_us:US.Education, US.GeneralMedicalService, US.SocialService, US.Sport and US.Entertainment-Recreation. DescribeFeatureType sets all minOccurs=0 and nillable=true.

fields.example: წმინდა ილია მართლის სახელობის ავტორიზებული საზოგადოებრივი კოლეჯი
Authorized Community College of Saint Ilia True
Authorized Community College of Saint Ilia True

fields.notes: N_A is a literal missing-value sentinel.

schemas.name: US.PublicAdministrationOffice
schemas.description: Exact properties for public-administration points; ministry_d replaces fcsubtype.

fields.notes: Meaning inferred from field name; no codebook returned.

schemas.name: BU.CulturalActivities and BU.Religion
schemas.description: Exact properties for the two standard cultural point families.

schemas.name: BU.Theatre, BU.Museum and BU.Historical.Monument
schemas.description: Exact properties for detailed cultural-type layers; includes shared fields plus typeid label/code.

samples.label: Vocational institution point
samples.value: {"type":"Feature","id":"US.Education.9572","geometry":{"type":"Point","coordinates":[44.74382424,41.72420584]},"geometry_name":"geom","properties":{"id":9572,"icc":"GE","fcsubtype_label":"Vocational Institutions","loc_label":"On ground surface","namn1":"წმინდა ილია მართლის სახელობის ავტორიზებული საზოგადოებრივი კოლეჯი","nama1":"Authorized Community College of Saint Ilia True","name_label":"Authorized Community College of Saint Ilia True","opened":"11:00_20:00","tel":"N_A","mob":"(+995) 577 400920","email":"N_A","web":"iliacolge.ge","socialnet":"N_A","fcsubtype":609}}

caveats: Inventory collected mainly 2017-2023 and is not operational status.
N_A is a literal missing-value sentinel in many fields.
Bbox counts are not municipal totals.
US.SocialService is dominated by consumer/business services, not welfare services.
Presence does not prove current operation, capacity, accessibility or public ownership.
reliability: GetCapabilities, DescribeFeatureType and GetFeature all returned usable data.
DescribeFeatureType confirmed nullable field types per layer family.
EMIS had 176 public Tbilisi schools while NSDI bbox matched 164 public schools, demonstrating update/coverage differences.

name: Cultural Heritage Agency monument and museum-reserve services
executiveSummary: The official monument service exposes legal status and document history, registry number, categories, address, dating, original/current function, classification, coordinate accuracy, coordinates and deep Georgian architectural or condition descriptions. A separate museum-reserve layer has contacts, hours and ticket-price fields.
provider: National Agency for Cultural Heritage Preservation of Georgia
geography: Georgia; a Unicode region query matched 2,598 Tbilisi monument points and one Tbilisi museum-reserve record.
updateCadence: Download filenames and modification dates indicated daily publication on 2026-07-22; underlying records are reference/historical and often lack CreateDate.
accessSummary: ArcGIS REST metadata/query and daily GeoJSON, file geodatabase and Shapefile downloads. TLS certificate validation failed; records were retrieved only with verification disabled for research.
license: Unclear; official download availability does not establish reuse terms.
recordCount: 2,598 Tbilisi immovable-monument matches; 1 Tbilisi museum-reserve match

accessPoints.label: Immovable monuments ArcGIS layer
accessPoints.notes: TLS certificate validation failed in current test. Tbilisi filter required Region=N'თბილისი'.

schemas.name: Immovable monument attributes
schemas.description: ArcGIS JSON paths under features[].attributes.

fields.meaning: Architectural, historical and sometimes condition narrative

fields.example: ახალი და უახლესი ისტორია ... მე-19 ს.

schemas.name: Museum-reserve attributes
schemas.description: ArcGIS JSON paths under features[].attributes.

samples.label: Tbilisi immovable monument
samples.value: {"ObjectID":2669,"ID":2669,"Name":"საცხოვრებელი სახლი","ComplexName":null,"StatusName":"კულტურული მემკვიდრეობის ძეგლი","StatusDocDate":"2007-10-01","StatusDocNumber":"3/181","RegistryN":"4221","CategoryName":"ობიექტი/ძეგლი კატეგორიის გარეშე","WorldCategoryName":null,"Region":"თბილისი","Municipality":"თბილისი","Address":"აღმაშენებელი დავითის გამზ./52.აღმაშენებელი დავითის გამზ./54","ExactDate":"1827 წ.","Classification":"არქიტექტურის","Accuracy":"სწორია","X":44.79964831,"Y":41.70607632,"CreateDate":null}

caveats: TLS certificate verification failed; production code must not silently disable TLS validation.
Daily publication of a file does not mean each record changes daily.
Description may discuss condition but no structured condition score exists.
Museum-reserve layer is sparse for Tbilisi.
reliability: ArcGIS layer metadata returned exact field definitions.
Unicode region query matched 2,598 monument rows.
Daily directory listed GeoJSON, Shapefile and geodatabase files named 22.07.2026.

name: Geostat PXWeb social statistics
subcategory: Demography, education, welfare, justice, health and culture
executiveSummary: Geostat's multidimensional catalog exposes exact dimensions for Tbilisi population, pensions, subsistence allowance, domestic violence, museums, schools and other annual social statistics. Metadata GET is machine-usable; tested data POST requests currently returned IIS 404.
geography: Georgia; Tbilisi appears as municipality or region in multiple tables. Some health and crime tables are national only.
updateCadence: Mostly annual. Tested dimensions reached 2025; municipal population reached 2026.
accessSummary: Official PXWeb metadata API supports unauthenticated JSON GET with CORS wildcard. Expected POST query to table URL returned HTTP 404 in current test; public table UI remains fallback.
recordCount: Varies by table; pension metadata has 82 municipality labels and years 2012-2025

accessPoints.label: PXWeb data query
accessPoints.notes: Unavailable in current test: IIS returned HTTP 404.

schemas.name: PXWeb table metadata
schemas.description: Metadata returned for each .px table.

samples.label: Pension table metadata fragment
samples.value: {"title":"Persons Receiving Pension by Municipalities","variables":[{"code":"Municipalities","text":"Municipalities","values":["0","1","2","3"],"valueTexts":["GEORGIA, total","TBILISI","Gldani-Nadzaladevi district","Didube-Chugureti district"]},{"code":"indicators","text":"indicators","values":["0"],"valueTexts":["Persons Receiving Pension"]},{"code":"years","text":"years","values":["0","1"],"valueTexts":["2012","2013"]}]}
samples.note: Metadata, not a statistical result row.

caveats: Data POST returned IIS 404 in current tests.
Machine values are ordinal IDs and must remain aligned to valueTexts.
Some tables use older combined Tbilisi district groupings.
Do not present metadata as observations.
reliability: Official metadata GET returned current table dimensions.
Catalog listed updated timestamps for school tables.
Public PXWeb UI can export tables manually if API POST remains broken.

name: OpenStreetMap social infrastructure through Overpass
executiveSummary: OSM is the widest flexible source for schools, health facilities, toilets, drinking water, social facilities, community centers, libraries, playgrounds and accessibility tags, with names, addresses, hours, contacts and operators where contributors supplied them.
geography: Global; query by Tbilisi bbox or mapped administrative area.
updateCadence: Contributor-driven; replication base time is available but per-feature ground truth can be stale.
accessSummary: Overpass QL over public /api/interpreter endpoints. JSON output, no auth; public instances have variable load/rate limits. Cached extracts are safer for demos.
license: Open Database License (ODbL) 1.0; attribution and share-alike obligations apply.

accessPoints.label: Overpass API
accessPoints.notes: Instance availability and rate limits vary.

schemas.name: Overpass JSON response
schemas.description: Response envelope and OSM elements.

fields.notes: Omitted tag means unknown, not false.

schemas.name: High-value OSM tags
schemas.description: All paths are optional string tags under elements[].tags.

samples.label: Representative school element shape
samples.note: Representative schema fragment; exact retained snapshot is linked by snapshotPath.

caveats: Coverage and tag completeness vary.
Absence is not evidence that a place or property is absent.
Public Overpass instances can reject or rate-limit queries.
Hours, contacts and access tags can become stale.
reliability: Existing project snapshot contains toilets, clinics, hospitals, drinking water and schools.
ODbL license is explicit.
Fallback is cached extract or dedicated Overpass provider.

name: Wikimedia Commons geosearch and image metadata
executiveSummary: Commons returns geotagged photographs near Tbilisi coordinates with image URLs, upload and capture dates, descriptions, categories, creator/credit, exact coordinates and machine-readable per-file license metadata.
provider: Wikimedia Commons contributors and Wikimedia Foundation API
geography: Global point-radius search; tested around 41.6938,44.8015 in central Tbilisi.
updateCadence: Uploads and metadata edits appear quickly; photograph capture time is a separate historical field.
accessSummary: Documented MediaWiki action API using generator=geosearch plus coordinates and imageinfo/extmetadata props. No auth for public reads.
license: Per file; tested results included CC BY-SA 4.0, CC BY 4.0 and CC0. Read each file's LicenseShortName, LicenseUrl and attribution metadata.

schemas.name: Commons file page and imageinfo
schemas.description: Page keyed by query.pages.{pageid} with image information.

schemas.name: Extended metadata value
schemas.description: Each extmetadata key is an object; observed keys include DateTime, ObjectName, Categories, GPSLatitude, GPSLongitude, ImageDescription, DateTimeOriginal, Credit, Artist, LicenseShortName, UsageTerms, AttributionRequired, LicenseUrl, Copyrighted, Restrictions and License.

caveats: Upload time is not photograph capture time.
Coverage depends on contributor geotagging.
License and attribution are per file.
ImageDescription and credit fields can contain HTML.
reliability: Official documented Action API returned coordinates and extmetadata.
File description page is a durable attribution/correction destination.
privacy: Contributor handles are public but should not be profiled.

name: iNaturalist observations
executiveSummary: iNaturalist exposes people-generated observations with event time, public or obscured coordinates, positional accuracy, quality grade, taxon identity and conservation context, media, annotations and identifications.
geography: Broad tested bbox 44.65-45.00 E, 41.62-41.85 N; not an administrative Tbilisi boundary.
updateCadence: Observation submissions and community updates are event-driven; observation date itself is historical.
accessSummary: Public GET /v1/observations with bbox, quality, paging and sorting filters. No auth for public reads.
license: Per observation and per photo; tested observation license_code was cc-by-nc.
recordCount: 32,698 research-grade observations in tested broad bbox

schemas.name: Observation response and core observation
schemas.description: High-value public fields; the API has additional annotation, identification, comment, project and vote objects documented separately.

fields.meaning: Accuracy of public coordinate in meters

schemas.name: Taxon and observation photo
schemas.description: Taxon identity, status and media fields.

caveats: Bbox is broader than administrative Tbilisi.
Threatened taxa can have intentionally obscured coordinates.
Observation and photo licenses vary.
Community identification can change.
reliability: Official API returned a current result and explicit total count.
updated_at and geoprivacy fields make change/privacy semantics visible.
privacy: Never attempt to reverse obscured coordinates.

name: GBIF biodiversity occurrences
executiveSummary: GBIF aggregates normalized occurrence records from iNaturalist, institutions and collections, including taxonomic interpretation, event time, coordinates and uncertainty, publisher/dataset IDs, media, per-record licenses and processing issues.
provider: Global Biodiversity Information Facility and publishing institutions
geography: Broad tested bbox 44.65-45.00 E, 41.62-41.85 N; not an administrative Tbilisi boundary.
updateCadence: Publisher ingestion and GBIF interpretation are periodic; event dates are historical.
accessSummary: Official occurrence search API, unauthenticated JSON GET. Up to 300 rows/page and a 100,000-row search window; use download API for bulk.
license: Per occurrence and per media object; tested row used CC BY-NC 4.0.
recordCount: 123,945 matches with coordinates in tested broad bbox

schemas.name: Occurrence search and result
schemas.description: Core normalized GBIF fields.

schemas.name: Occurrence media
schemas.description: Media metadata embedded in a result.

caveats: Bbox is broader than administrative Tbilisi.
Aggregate includes iNaturalist and other publishers; deduplicate using source IDs.
Retain issues and uncertainty fields.
License can differ between occurrence and media.
Search pagination has a 100,000-record boundary.
reliability: Official API and documentation are stable and versioned.
Publisher and dataset keys preserve provenance.
GBIF download service is the fallback for bulk/citable extracts.
privacy: Recorder and identifier credits are public attribution; avoid profiling people.

name: State Procurement Agency OCDS archive
executiveSummary: The legacy official open-data application exposes a paginated tender list and OCDS 1.1 JSON packages containing buyer, parties, classifications, items, dates, values, tenderers, awards, suppliers, documents and contracts.
geography: Georgia; Tbilisi buyers can be selected from buyer identity/address downstream.
updateCadence: Unknown current cadence; list had 278,163 rows but tested record was from 2018.
accessSummary: HTTP JSON list and per-tender OCDS package. No auth. HTTPS certificate was expired/unusable and HTTP will be mixed content in a browser, so server-side retrieval is required.
license: Unclear/problematic: OCDS package literally returned license and publicationPolicy as http://FIXME placeholders.
recordCount: List total string: 278163; 27,817 pages at 10 rows/page

schemas.name: Tender list response
schemas.description: Paginated legacy list.

schemas.name: OCDS package and release
schemas.description: Observed OCDS 1.1 package and core nested paths.

fields.field: *.documents[].id / title / description / documentType / format / language / url

caveats: HTTP-only host and broken HTTPS certificate.
license and publicationPolicy are invalid placeholders.
Literal string null appears instead of JSON null.
Sample contained a contract-period chronology anomaly.
Current-list cadence and sorting were not validated.
reliability: Official list and per-record OCDS JSON both returned usable data.
OCDS identifiers and nested provenance support validation.
Server-side caching is required for secure web apps.
privacy: Parties and documents can include personal data; minimize and avoid republishing unnecessary details.
